INTERFACE COLLECTION •add(o) Add a new element •clear() Remove all elements •contains(o) Membership checking. •IsEmpty() Whether it is empty •iterator() Return an iterator •remove(o) Remove an element •size() The number of elements INTERFACE LIST •add(i,o) Insert o at position i •add(o) Append o to the end •get(i) Return the i-th element •remove(i) Remove the i-th element •remove(o) Remove the element o •set(i,o) Replace the i-th element with o INTERFACE MAP @eair () containsKey (k) containsValue ( ) get (k) 1sEmpty () keySet () put (k V) mo() size () values () Remove all mappings W hether contains a mapping for k W hether contains a mapping to v The value associated with k Whether it is empty Set of keys A ssociate v with k Remove the mapping for k The number of pairs

Type-safe checking & fail-fast in compile time ArrayList files = new ArrayList(): // You do not know which kind of object are store inside the list String filename = an (String) files.get (0): // After generic classes ArrayList<String> files = new ArrayList<>(); // You do not need the cast operation anymore - String filename = files.get(0):
